title: BetterGameSetting [BTW/MITE]
description: Ports the game settings screen from 1.7.2+ to Minecraft 1.6.4.
body:
The mod supports both 1.6.4-MITE (FishModLoader) and BTWCE 3.x (LegacyFabric)

Because different mappings and mod loaders are used, MITE and BTW are split into two JAR files.

## Features

![resource pack screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44e0478cd6fc8afdc2ea61f711cecd7a9ac61999.png)

![language screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7669aad9eadb40e4828600fdfec4e973153193f2.png)

![game rules screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd838616c8c8c84c363cfd6d7b594831168356ad.png)

Ported part of the 1.7.2+ screen to 1.6.4 and some option improvements
+ Allow select multiple resource packs
+ Better adjustment of render distance & gui scale
+ Custom FPS limit
+ Lower FOV support
+ Better GUI scala adjustment
+ Better setup of keybindings
+ Categorized sound adjustment
+ Transparent background support(compatible with ModMenu and EMI）
+ Better font tweaks & fixes
+ Modern world create screen (Improved from [CreateWorldUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/crwui))
+ Searchable language screen

In addition, it portes, includes and improves [FontFixer](https://modrinth.com/mod/font-fixer)(Both)，[InputMethodBlocker](https://modrinth.com/mod/inputmethodblocker)(BTW Only) and [FabricASM](https://github.com/Chocohead/Fabric-ASM)(BTW Only).

## Depends
* The MITE version requires 1.6.4-MITE, FishModLoader-v3 and [Conditional Mixin-MITE](https://github.com/MinecraftIsTooEasy/conditional-mixin-mite/releases/tag/0.6.4)
* The BTW version requires BTWCE 3.x, LegacyFabric and ModMenu [BTW Port]

## License
* This mod and the included FontFixer, IMBlocker, and CreateWorldUI, is released under the MIT License.
* The FabricASM included in the BTW version is distributed under MPL-2.0
